commands.review_summary:
The branch routes interactive and non-interactive onboarding config writes through the pending plugin install-record commit helper, adds a shared `plugins.installs` unset-path detector, adds migration/doctor regressions, and isolates one shell-helper Vitest test in a new tooling shard.

PR surface: Source +35, Tests +185, Other +24. Total +244 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main non-interactive local and remote onboarding call `replaceConfigFile` directly, while the PR routes those writes through the existing pending plugin install-record migration helper. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is appropriate because the PR has a protected maintainer label, a compatibility-sensitive config-write exception, and a failing guard check rather than a narrow autonomous repair defect.

target.title: fix(onboard): preserve rerun config migrations
target.body:
Summary
- Preserve existing agents.list and route bindings on onboard reruns unless --reset is explicit.
- Keep plugin install-record migration size drops allowed only for the managed plugins.installs unset path, including non-interactive local/remote onboarding.
- Add doctor/schema regressions and isolate the shell-helper Vitest test so CI runs it without shared mock bleed-through.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/wizard/setup.test.ts src/commands/onboard-non-interactive.gateway.test.ts src/commands/onboard-config.test.ts src/config/io.write-prepare.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/validation.allowed-values.test.ts src/commands/doctor-legacy-config.migrations.test.ts src/scripts/test-live-media.test.ts test/scripts/openclaw-e2e-instance.test.ts test/vitest-scoped-config.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts test/vitest-scoped-config.test.ts test/scripts/openclaw-e2e-instance.test.ts
- env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed
- OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=2 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.full-core-support-boundary.config.ts
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main

Refs #84748
Closes #84692

Co-authored-by: yetval <yetvald@gmail.com>
target.author: steipete
